gestures.mdmPrompt: a person stands with a friendly posture, opens arms wide while explaining multiplication as adding groups
a tutor leans slightly forward, points to the problem while inviting learners to try solving 3 multiplied by 4
a person raises their left hand, holds up fingers while counting and clearly asking what is 3 plus 3
a tutor shifts weight slightly, raises their left hand and fingers to count while asking about 6 plus 3
a person stands tall, extends their left arm with fingers raised while inquiring about what is 9 plus 3
a tutor leans in slightly, raises both hands to shoulder level and clearly repeats the question about 3 times 4
a person stands confidently, opens arms wide while explaining multiplication using groups of dots to clarify
a tutor leans forward, points at the new example while enthusiastically inviting everyone to find how many dots there are
a person raises their left hand, holds up fingers while directly asking how many dots are in one group
a person shifts weight, extends their left hand with fingers up while clearly asking what is 3 plus 3
a tutor stands confidently, raises their left hand and counts fingers while checking understanding of 6 plus 3
a person leans slightly forward, raises both hands in an inviting manner while asking to try the original problem again
